data.title: Bitcoin Retail Demand Rises 3.4% As Small Investors Return To The Market – New ATH Soon?
data.description:
Retail participation in the Bitcoin (BTC) market is on the rise, as on-chain data indicates that smaller investors are gradually re-entering the space. This renewed activity is often a sign of growing confidence in the asset and can act as a catalyst for the next leg up in price. Bitcoin Witnesses Rise In Retail Participation According to a recent CryptoQuant Quicktake post by on-chain analyst Carmelo Aleman, retail investors – defined as wallets holding less than $10,000 worth of BTC – are steadily returning to the market. These participants are typically the most reactive to market movements
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-retail-demand-rises-3-4-as-small-investors-return-to-the-market-new-ath-soon/

data.title: Crypto Investing for Beginners: Building Your Portfolio
data.description:

Whether you’re here because your friend won’t stop talking about Bitcoin, or you just want to understand how people are making money (or memes) off digital coins, this guide is your starting line. At its core, crypto investing means putting your money into digital currencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or other altcoins with the hope that they’ll grow in value over time. But like any investment, it’s not just about jumping in and picking random coins—it’s about building a The post Crypto Investing for Beginners: Building Your Portfolio first appeared on The Shib Daily

data.title: LBank has launched Axelrod by Virtuals (AXR)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched Axelrod by Virtuals (AXR) at 11:00 (SGT) on May 15, and opened the AXR/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 11:00 on May 16.

data.title: Ukraine Eyes Bitcoin for National Reserves in First-for-Europe Move
data.description:
In a move that feels both futuristic and kinda inevitable, Ukraine is working on a law that would let it officially hold Bitcoin as part of its national reserves. If they pull this off, they’ll be one of the first countries in Europe to go beyond crypto-friendly buzzwords and actually put digital assets to work.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/bitcoin-btc/ukraine-eyes-bitcoin-for-national-reserves-in-first-for-europe-move/

data.title: The total subscription amount of Gate.io Launchpad's first project Puffverse (PFVS) exceeded 41 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the subscription of Gate.io Launchpad's first project Puffverse (PFVS) is in progress, and the total investment amount has exceeded 41 million USDT in 48 hours. In order to enhance the flexibility of participation and optimize the user experience, Gate.io has simultaneously launched the "repurchase" function, allowing users to replenish funds unlimited times during the project subscription period.
According to DefiLlama data, driven by this Launchpad subscription activity, Gate.io's net inflow in the past 24 hours ranked second among global trading platforms.

data.title: The crypto market generally fell back, with the Layer2 sector leading the decline by 7.02%, and ETH falling below $2,600
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On May 15, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sectors generally pulled back. The Layer2 and GameFi sectors, which rose sharply yesterday, fell by 7.02% and 6.99% respectively. In the Layer2 sector, Starknet (STRK) fell by 9.64% in 24 hours, and Celestia (TIA) fell by 9.72%. In the GameFi sector, Axie Infinity (AXS) and Decentraland (MANA) fell by 9.05% and 10.65% respectively.
In addition, Ethereum (ETH) broke through $2,700 yesterday and began to fall back, falling 3.52% in 24 hours and falling below $2,600. Bitcoin (BTC) fell by 0.68%, but still remained around $103,000.
In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 1.85%, and the CeFi sector fell 1.99%. Among them, LEO Token (LEO) and Amp (AMP) rose 2.00% and 13.75% against the trend respectively; the Layer1 sector fell 4.53%, and TRON (TRX) rose slightly by 0.55%; the Meme sector fell 4.60%, the DeFi sector fell 4.86%, and Ethena (ENA) fell 8.85%.
The crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector shows that the ssiLayer2, ssiGameFi, and ssiSocialFi indexes fell 7.89%, 7.11%, and 6.02% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Europol helps dismantle $23M ‘mafia crypto bank’
data.description:
European law enforcement in January arrested 17 suspects of a “mafia crypto bank” who are said to have laundered over 21 million euros ($23. 5 million) in crypto for criminal entities in China and the Middle East. The money laundering services were allegedly carried out on behalf of other criminal networks engaged in migrant smuggling and drug trafficking, Europol said in a May 14 statement. Spanish authorities said the criminal organization ran a secret informal money transfer system called hawala and was often compensated in crypto
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/europol-dismantle-mafia-crypto-bank-17-arrested?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fnocache%3D1710693569692&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches ‘Trillion Dollar Security’ Initiative
data.description:
Ethereum just made a bold move that shows it’s thinking way, way ahead. The Ethereum Foundation has announced its “Trillion Dollar Security” initiative, or 1TS for short, and the name pretty much says it all. The goal? Make sure Ethereum is secure enough to handle the kind of money and user volume that traditional financial.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-foundation-launches-trillion-dollar-security-initiative/

data.title: Squads launches enterprise-level stablecoin account service Altitude and has received strategic investment from Haun Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana Ecosystem Multi-Signature Protocol Developer Squads announced the launch of Altitude, an enterprise-level stablecoin account service that allows companies to open and manage US dollar accounts directly on the blockchain, completely bypassing the traditional banking system. Squads CEO Stepan Simkin introduced that the service is based on smart contracts and can ensure the three core advantages of fund ownership, programmability and transparency. The most prominent feature of the Altitude service is that corporate users no longer need to rely on traditional banks or US physical institutions, and all funds will be managed by on-chain smart contracts. The project has received strategic investment support from Haun Ventures, and the specific amount has not yet been disclosed.

data.title: 10T Holdings: A large number of crypto startups scare off venture capital institutions with valuations of 50 to 80 times
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Dan Tapiero, CEO of crypto venture capital firm 10T Holdings, pointed out at the Toronto Consensus Conference that too many crypto startups pursue valuations far exceeding their revenues, making it difficult for venture capital to get returns. Tapiero said: "For some reason, founders and CEOs think they should raise funds at 50 to 80 times their revenues. This makes it difficult for us to create returns for liquidity providers." Tapiero revealed that his agency has rejected more than 200 projects due to overvaluation, including the bankrupt FTX, BlockFi and Celsius. 10T Holdings' investment criteria are corporate valuations of more than $400-500 million and a price-to-sales ratio of no more than 10 times. 
Despite concerns about valuation bubbles, PitchBook data shows that crypto venture capital transaction volume in the first quarter of 2025 increased by more than 100% month-on-month to $6 billion. Pantera Capital CEO Dan Morehead, who was also in the discussion, suggested that venture capital adopt a combination investment strategy of "equity + tokens". 86% of the projects invested by his institutions have achieved profitability, and 22 have become unicorn companies. (Coin telegraph)

data.title: Bernstein: Ethereum's surge is driven by institutional interest and Layer 2 demand
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bernstein analysts reported on Wednesday that Ethereum has seen an astonishing increase in the past week (a 42% increase in 7 days), mainly because in addition to value storage, the actual value of digital assets has been more recognized, and institutions and retail investors have become increasingly interested in blockchain and stablecoin payments. On the technical level, the Pectra upgrade completed on May 8 improved the efficiency of network operation. In terms of application, the issuance of stablecoins on the Ethereum chain accounts for 51%. Stripe recently launched a corporate stablecoin account service, and Meta also restarted the stablecoin project. The report mentioned that Robinhood plans to launch a tokenized stock service on Ethereum Layer2 and has completed a $179 million acquisition of Layer2 exchange WonderFi. The advancement of the US stablecoin regulatory bill also provides the market with a clearer policy environment. Analysts pointed out that the continued use of ETH to pay for Gas fees on the Layer2 network will form long-term demand support. (Decrypt)

data.title: Animoca Brands makes strategic investment in UXLINK
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced that after Animoca Ventures, Animoca Brands has become its new strategic investor. The head of the UXLINK community said that Animoca Brands' investment will help UXLINK build a new Web3 social model through AI Growth Agent, which is expected to benefit hundreds of millions of social accounts and corporate accounts in the future. At the same time, UXLINK will connect crypto assets with the real world through the PayFi ecosystem, promote the combination of Web3 and Web2, and create a new lifestyle. It is reported that UXLINK is the world's largest Web3 social infrastructure platform, with about 800,000 daily active users, and its ecosystem supports more than 90,000 Web3 communities.

data.title: BTC Price At Risk Of Sliding Below $100,000 As Demand Slows Down
data.description:
Key Insights: Bitcoin demonstrated waning demand above $104,000 as evident by its sideways price action in the last 6 days. As a result, investors were concerned about the risks of price potentially dipping below $100,000. Among the key reasons for those concerns was the steady drop in Bitcoin dominance in the last 7 days
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/14/btc-price-at-risk-of-sliding-below-100000-as-demand-slows-down/

data.title: Gate.io Alpha Launches PRAI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io Alpha has launched Privasea AI (PRAI) and launched a limited-time airdrop event from 22:00 on May 14, 2025 to 22:00 on May 17, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, you can get airdrop rewards by completing your first transaction on Alpha (regardless of currency) or any PRAI transaction, with a total prize pool of 600,000 PRAI.

data.title: Solana Network Leads Global DEX Trading Volume with Significant Weekly Growth
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama reveals that Solana's network decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume reached $45.71 billion in the past 24 hours, ranking first globally. Additionally, over the past week, Solana's DEX trading volume totaled $275.15 billion, marking a 48% increase.

The top three DEX protocols within the Solana ecosystem are Raydium, Meteora, and Orca, contributing significantly to this impressive performance.

data.title: Nous Research Launches Decentralized AI Training Network
data.description:
According to Foresight News, open-source AI company Nous Research has announced the launch of its decentralized AI training network, Psyche. This initiative aims to aggregate global computing resources to train advanced AI models. The Psyche test network went live today and will pre-train a large language model with 40 billion parameters, laying the groundwork for future open scientific research.

Previously, Foresight News reported, citing Fortune, that Paradigm invested $50 million in Nous Research, valuing the company at $1 billion in tokens.
